title: Refresh tower init Codex model defaults
objective: Update the tower init custom model picker so the five default Codex options reflect the current Codex model lineup on main rather than the legacy o-series and gpt-4.1 entries.
instructions: Change only the Codex model shortlist used by the init model picker in src/control_tower/config_ui.py.
Use this exact Codex order, based on the current local Codex model registry visible to Tower: gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.2.
Add or update focused tests so the Codex picker default list is covered and future regressions are caught.
Do not modify Gemini or Cursor model lists unless required by the test changes.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Stay within the init UI/model picker scope.

references: ~/.codex/models_cache.json current visible order: gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.2, gpt-5.1-codex-max, gpt-5.1-codex-mini

expected_outputs: ResultPacket with changed files and verification results.
definition_of_done: Codex picker defaults show the new five-model list in the requested order.
